persona.id-verification.body: edX uses identity verification to verify your requested name change. Double check that the name below is an exact match to your name as it appears on your valid government-issued identification card.
persona.id-verification.requirements-col: The name you asserted appears on your government-issued identification card on the <hyperlink>Account Settings</hyperlink> page must exactly match your government-issued identification card.
You need a valid government-issued identification card that contains your full name and photo, such as a driver's license or passport.
You need access to a device that has a camera.
persona.id-verification.privacy-collapsi: edX uses identity verification to verify your requested name change.
What information does edX collect during and after identity verification?

edX does not collect or store any additional personally identifiable information related to your identity verification attempt. edX stores whether your identity verification attempt was successful and whether the name you asserted appears on your government-issued identification card was verified.
What information does edX share with the identity verification vendor?

edX shares your name with our identity verification vendor. The name that is shared with our identity verification vendor is the name you asserted appears on your government-issued identification card on the <hyperlink>Account Settings</hyperlink> page.
persona.id-verification.cta.header: Your name as it appears on your valid government-issued identification card. Must match exactly:
persona.id-verification.alert.fail.not-r: You are not enrolled in a course that requires identity verification.
You do not have a pending name change. Go to your Account Settings to change your name.
persona.id-verification.alert.fail.canno: Your account settings are managed by {managerTitle}. If you want to change the name on your account, please contact your {profileDataManager} administrator for help.
persona.id-verification.alert.fail.somet: Identity verification could not be loaded. Please try again. If this issue persists, please <hyperlink>contact our support team</hyperlink>.
